candidate_summary: Original Pebble smartwatch 2012 Kickstarter; category-defining early smartwatch, then a Kickstarter record.
observed_outcome_summary: Closed 2012-05-18 with $10,266,845 pledged by 68,929 backers against a $100,000 goal (~100x). Revealed preorder buyer-action for a then-novel product category.
raw_outcome_evidence: Wikipedia 'Pebble (watch)', verbatim: 'On May 18, 2012, funding closed with $10,266,845 pledged by 68,929 people.' (Operator-fetched 2026-05-31.)

action_signal_candidates.notes: 68,929 backers; $10,266,845 pledged; goal $100,000. Tier-1 revealed preorder action.

geographic_demographic_notes: Global Kickstarter audience; very early smartwatch adopters.
reviewer_notes: Recommended evidence_tier=1. Pairs with pebble_time_kickstarter_2015 (same company, 2012 vs 2015). Recommended designation: TRAINING.
uncertainty_flags: self_selected_denominator: backers/users are self-selected; the receptive/uncertain/skeptical proportions of the FULL addressable market are NOT externally observable
buyer_numerator_only: the action signal gives the buyer/action-positive count, not a four-bucket distribution
extreme_self_selection: 100x-over-goal reflects enthusiast self-selection, not a mass-market sample
